name: Quaker Oat Bran Muffins- Janet's
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. Line 12 medium muffin cups with paper baking cups or spray the bottoms of the cups only with vegetable oil cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: Quaker Oat Bran Cereal, Brown Sugar, Baking Powder, and Salt (if using).
4. Add the Milk, Egg Whites, Honey or Molasses, and Vegetable Oil to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
5. Fill each prepared muffin cup almost full with the batter.
6. Bake for 15 to 17 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. One dozen
Variations:
- Raisin Nut Muffins: Add 1/4 cup raisins and 1/4 cup chopped nuts.
- Banana Nut Muffins: Add 1/2 cup mashed banana (about 1 medium) and 1/4 cup chopped nuts.
- Blueberry Muffins: Add 1/2 cup fresh or frozen blueberries.
- Apple Cinnamon Muffins: Add 1/2 cup chopped apple (about 1 small), 1/4 cup chopped nuts, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon.
Note: To freeze, wrap the muffins securely and store in the freezer for up to 3 months. To reheat frozen muffins, microwave at HIGH for 25 to 30 seconds per muffin.
